pageContext.name: Batman Knightmare
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Legacy Replica 1:4 line - Batman Knightmare! This DC Collectible Batman Statue is limited edition and based on the references from Zack Snyder's Justice League.   DC Comics fans, don't miss your chance to add Batman Knightmare 1:4 Legacy Replica Statue to your DC collection.
